## Summary

## Project Or Area Affected

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Starter
- [ ] Solution
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Tooling
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Screenshots Or Preview

Add screenshots only when they show real current behavior. Do not add fake previews.

## Accessibility Checks

- [ ] Keyboard-only usage checked
- [ ] Visible focus checked
- [ ] Narrow viewport checked
- [ ] 200% zoom checked
- [ ] Reduced motion checked where relevant
- [ ] Not applicable

## Tests Performed

List exact commands and results.

## Responsive Checks

List viewport sizes or devices checked.

## Dependency Changes

List added, removed, or updated dependencies and why they are needed.

## Security Considerations

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, API keys, or real `.env` files committed
- [ ] API or mock-auth limitations documented where relevant
- [ ] Imported, stored, or API data validated where relevant

## Documentation Updates

List README, ROADMAP, project README, or docs changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Starter and solution remain separate where relevant
- [ ] Required features are documented
- [ ] Optional challenges are clearly marked
- [ ] Verification commands are reported truthfully
- [ ] No deployment claim is made without live verification
- [ ] No fake preview image is added
